name: Six-Can Slow Cooked Chili
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Pinto beans or dark/light kidney beans with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a 3-1/2 to 4-quart slow cooker.
2. Mix well and cover the pot.
3. Cook on high setting for 2 to 4 hours or until thoroughly heated.
Alternatively, cook on low setting for 8 to 9 hours.
Turn off the heat when the chili is ready.
